summary: End-to-end backend (pytest, 15/15 pass) + frontend (Playwright) testing of PhD Outreach Agent. All 4 tabs, LLM discovery/brief/CV/SOP/proposal/email generation, outreach send/skip/reply flow, manual entries, and profile persistence verified.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: logger is defined AFTER logging.basicConfig at bottom of file but referenced inside discover() route (line 106). Works because the route runs later, but placement is fragile - move logging config + logger declaration to top of module.

Frontend Outreach package generation triggers 4 sequential LLM calls (cv/sop/proposal/email) - if one fails partway, previous ones are still stored on backend but UI does not surface partial success; consider partial-progress persistence UI.
outreach.pending returns full professor doc with an embedded outreach; consider using an explicit response model for shape stability.
Duplicate detection in /discover keys on name+university - LLM sometimes returns slightly different capitalizations which would create duplicates.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_SkipProf, TEST_ManualProf, TEST_UIManual manual entries via API/UI as part of testing. Two real professors (Prof. Nilli Lavie UCL, Prof. John Duncan Cambridge) were seeded via LLM discovery in the attention track.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests run sequentially (pytest -n 0) due to Emergent LLM 429 concurrency limit. pytest.ini defaults to -n 2 --dist loadscope but tests hitting LLM must serialize (use -n 0). Test file at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covers all endpoints. UI uses REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL routing through /api prefix. All data-testid attributes present as documented.
